sglang.author: HandH1998

Benchmark
GPU: sm89-L40

meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, TP=1
meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct N=6144 K=4096:

sglang.title: Add CPU affinity setting to latency benchmark
sglang.author: hubertlu-tw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR adds CPU affinity setting (i.e. NUMA binding) to latency test (bench_one_batch.py) to increase performance.
Modifications
Leverage "set_gpu_proc_affinity" when SGLANG_SET_CPU_AFFINITY=1
